sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT *
			FROM {$table}
			WHERE {$column} LIKE %s
			ORDER BY {$key_column} ASC
			LIMIT 1
		", $key ) )

$wpdb->get_results(
			'SELECT `ID`, `post_title`, `post_parent`
					FROM `' . $wpdb->posts . '` p
					LEFT JOIN `' . $wpdb->postmeta . '` m ON p.ID = m.post_id
					WHERE `post_status` = \'inherit\'
					AND `post_title` = CONCAT(\'Auto Save \', DATE_FORMAT(post_date, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%i"))
					AND  m.`meta_key` = \'_elementor_data\';'
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
			'SELECT `ID`, `post_title`, `post_parent`
					FROM `' . $wpdb->posts . '` p
					LEFT JOIN `' . $wpdb->postmeta . '` m ON p.ID = m.post_id
					WHERE `post_status` = \'inherit\'
					AND `post_title` REGEXP \'^Auto Save [0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2} [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$\'
					AND  m.`meta_key` = \'_elementor_data\';'
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
			'SELECT `ID`, `post_title`, `post_parent`
					FROM `' . $wpdb->posts . '` p
					LEFT JOIN `' . $wpdb->postmeta . '` m ON p.ID = m.post_id
					WHERE `post_status` = \'inherit\'
					AND `post_title` REGEXP \'[[:alnum:]]+ [[:alnum:]]+ [0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2} [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$\'
					AND  m.`meta_key` = \'_elementor_data\';'
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT `post_type`, `post_status`, COUNT(`ID`) `hits`
				FROM {$wpdb->posts} `p`
				LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} `pm` ON(`p`.`ID` = `pm`.`post_id` AND  `meta_key` = '_elementor_edit_mode' )
				WHERE `post_type` != 'elementor_library' AND `meta_value` IS NULL
				GROUP BY `post_type`, `post_status`;"
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT `post_type`, `post_status`, COUNT(`ID`) `hits`
				FROM {$wpdb->posts} `p`
				LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} `pm` ON(`p`.`ID` = `pm`.`post_id`)
				WHERE `post_type` != 'elementor_library'
					AND `meta_key` = '_elementor_edit_mode' AND `meta_value` = 'builder'
				GROUP BY `post_type`, `post_status`;"
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT `meta_value`, COUNT(`ID`) `hits`
				FROM {$wpdb->posts} `p`
				LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} `pm` ON(`p`.`ID` = `pm`.`post_id`)
				WHERE `post_type` = 'elementor_library'
					AND `meta_key` = '_elementor_template_type'
				GROUP BY `post_type`, `meta_value`;"
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT `meta_value`, COUNT(`ID`) `hits`, `post_status`
				FROM {$wpdb->posts} `p`
				LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} `pm` ON(`p`.`ID` = `pm`.`post_id`)
				WHERE `post_type` = 'elementor_library'
					AND `meta_key` = '_elementor_template_type'
				GROUP BY `post_type`, `meta_value`, `post_status`;"
		)

$wpdb->get_col(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT pm.meta_value
				FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} pm
				INNER JOIN {$wpdb->posts} p ON p.ID = pm.post_id
					AND p.post_type <> %s
				WHERE pm.meta_key = '_elementor_version'
					AND pm.meta_value <> %s
					AND p.post_modified_gmt > %s
				ORDER BY pm.meta_value ASC
				LIMIT %d",
				$cpt,
				self::POST_STORAGE_INTRO_VERSION,
				$cutoff,
				self::QUERY_LIMIT
			)
		)

			"UPDATE $wpdb->postmeta SET meta_value = %s
			WHERE meta_key = '_elementor_template_type' && post_id in ( %s );

printf( /* translators: 1. "Terms of service" link, 2. "Privacy policy" link */ esc_html__( 'By clicking Sign Up, you agree to Elementor\'s %1$s and %2$s', 'elementor' ), sprintf( '%2$s', esc_url( Beta_Testers::NEWSLETTER_TERMS_URL ), esc_html__( 'Terms of Service', 'elementor' ) ), sprintf( '%2$s', esc_url( Beta_Testers::NEWSLETTER_PRIVACY_URL ), esc_html__( 'Privacy Policy', 'elementor' ) ) )

							selected( $selected, $value, false ),
							esc_html( $type_title )
						)

wp_die( sprintf( '%s::%s: Cannot add a control outside of a section (use `start_controls_section`).', get_called_class(), __FUNCTION__ ) )
printf( '', esc_attr( $device_key ), esc_attr( $tooltip_label ), esc_attr( $breakpoint_classes_map[ $device_key ] ) )

printf( '

', esc_html__( 'Tailor how Elementor enhances your site, from post types to other functions.', 'elementor' ) )

wp_send_json_error( [ 'message' => esc_html__( 'An error occurred while trying to create a kit.', 'elementor' ) ], 500 )
wp_send_json_success( esc_html__( 'New kit have been created successfully', 'elementor' ) )

printf(
			'<label class="screen-reader-text" for="%1$s">%2$s</label>',

				WHERE `post_type` != 'elementor_library' AND `meta_value` IS NULL

				WHERE `post_type` != 'elementor_library'
					AND `meta_key` = '_elementor_edit_mode' AND `meta_value` = 'builder'
				GROUP BY `post_type`, `post_status`;"
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT `meta_value`, COUNT(`ID`) `hits`
				FROM {$wpdb->posts} `p`
				LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} `pm` ON(`p`.`ID` = `pm`.`post_id`)
				WHERE `post_type` = 'elementor_library'
					AND `meta_key` = '_elementor_template_type'
				GROUP BY `post_type`, `meta_value`;"
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT `meta_value`, COUNT(`ID`) `hits`, `post_status`
				FROM {$wpdb->posts} `p`
				LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} `pm` ON(`p`.`ID` = `pm`.`post_id`)
				WHERE `post_type` = 'elementor_library'
					AND `meta_key` = '_elementor_template_type'
				GROUP BY `post_type`, `meta_value`, `post_status`;"
		)

sanitizers.expression:
$wpdb->prepare( "
			SELECT *
			FROM {$table}
			WHERE {$column} LIKE %s
			ORDER BY {$key_column} ASC
			LIMIT 1
		", $key )
esc_html( sprintf( 'Use `%s` hook to register ajax action.', 'elementor/ajax/register_actions' ) )

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT p1.ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} AS p
					LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->posts} AS p1 ON (p.ID = p1.post_parent || p.ID = p1.ID)
					WHERE p.post_type = %s;", $type )

$wpdb->prepare(
			"UPDATE $wpdb->postmeta SET meta_value = %s
			WHERE meta_key = '_elementor_template_type' && post_id in ( %s );
		 ", 'wp-' . $type, $sql_post_ids )
esc_html( "Styles validation failed for style `$style_id`. Widget ID: `$widget_id`. " . $result->errors()->to_string() )
esc_html( 'Settings validation failed for component overridable props: ' . $result->errors()->to_string() )
esc_html( "Invalid element: Element type $el_type with widget type $widget_type is not registered." )
esc_html( "Invalid element: Element type $el_type with widget type $widget_type is not an atomic element/widget." )
esc_html( "Prop key '$prop_key' does not exist in the schema of element '{$element_instance->get_element_type()}'." )

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT pm.meta_value
				FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} pm
				INNER JOIN {$wpdb->posts} p ON p.ID = pm.post_id
					AND p.post_type <> %s
				WHERE pm.meta_key = '_elementor_version'
					AND pm.meta_value <> %s
					AND p.post_modified_gmt > %s
				ORDER BY pm.meta_value ASC
				LIMIT %d",
				$cpt,
				self::POST_STORAGE_INTRO_VERSION,
				$cutoff,
				self::QUERY_LIMIT
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT pm.post_id, pm.meta_value
			 FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} pm
			 INNER JOIN {$wpdb->posts} p ON p.ID = pm.post_id
			 WHERE pm.meta_key = %s
			   AND pm.meta_value IN ($placeholders)
			   AND p.post_type = %s
			   AND p.post_status = %s",
			array_merge(
				[ Global_Class_Post::META_KEY_ID ],
				$class_ids,
				[ Global_Class_Post_Type::CPT, 'publish' ]
			)
		)
